title: Termite Treatment in Piscataway, NJ | $800 - $4,000
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment services in Piscataway, NJ starting at $800. Expert termite extermination and prevention for homes and businesses. Licensed & insured. Call today!
intro: Termites pose a serious threat to Piscataway homes and businesses, causing extensive structural damage if left untreated. Best Pest Control NYC offers comprehensive termite treatment services throughout Piscataway, NJ, with pricing ranging from $800 to $4,000 depending on the severity of infestation and property size. Our licensed technicians use the latest treatment methods to eliminate termites and protect your property investment.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings decades of experience serving Piscataway and surrounding New Jersey communities with proven termite elimination solutions. Our certified exterminators provide thorough inspections, customized treatment plans, and ongoing monitoring to ensure your property remains termite-free, all backed by our satisfaction guarantee.
localContext: Piscataway's mix of historic colonial homes, modern developments near Rutgers University, and commercial properties along Route 287 all face termite risks, particularly given New Jersey's humid climate. From older neighborhoods near the Raritan River to newer constructions in residential areas, we've protected countless Piscataway properties from costly termite damage.

faqs.question: How much does termite treatment cost in Piscataway, NJ?
faqs.answer: Termite treatment in Piscataway typically ranges from $800 to $4,000 depending on the size of your property, extent of infestation, and treatment method required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes with no hidden fees, ensuring you understand the full scope of treatment needed for your specific situation.

faqs.question: What termite treatment methods do you use in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: We offer multiple termite treatment options including liquid termiticide barrier treatments, termite bait station systems, and localized spot treatments. Our technicians will assess your property and recommend the most effective method based on the type of termites present, infestation level, and your property's construction.

faqs.question: How long does termite treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Liquid treatments typically begin working within 24-48 hours, with complete colony elimination occurring within 90 days. Bait station systems may take 3-6 months for full colony elimination but provide ongoing protection. We include follow-up inspections to verify treatment effectiveness and ensure termites are completely eradicated.

faqs.question: Do you offer termite prevention services in Piscataway?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive termite prevention services including perimeter treatments, moisture control recommendations, and annual inspection programs. Preventative treatments are especially important in Piscataway due to New Jersey's climate and can save thousands in potential damage repairs while typically costing significantly less than full infestation treatments.
